feed.title: Techno Tim
feed.subtitle: Techno Tim Home - Documentation and More

entry.title: I Rebuilt My Home Server — Quieter, Faster, and Ready for 2025

link.title: I Rebuilt My Home Server — Quieter, Faster, and Ready for 2025

entry.summary: I rebuilt my home server from the ground up: CPU, GPU, RAM, fans, SSDs, and power supply… even some “accessory lighting”. This thing is now quieter, faster, and built to handle just about anything I throw at it in 2025 and hopefully beyond. Thank you to Noctua for helping to make this server quiet! Thank you to Patrick from Serve the Home for the CPU upgrades! (Both Noctua and Patrick gifted...

entry.title: Turns Out, VGA to HDMI Isn’t That Simple…

link.title: Turns Out, VGA to HDMI Isn’t That Simple…

entry.summary: I tested 10 VGA to HDMI adapters and only some actually worked. If you have a homelab server or older machine and have failed converting your video signal when getting into the OS or BIOS, you know what I’m talking about. Find out which one’s work, which one’s don’t, and what to avoid before you waste time and money. 📺 Watch Video Info Here are the 10 adapters I tested with my Supermicro s...

entry.title: Pi-hole Syncing… But Smarter...
entry.summary: Running multiple Pi-hole servers has always been a challenge, until now. In this video, I’ll show you a tool called Nebula Sync that helps keep them in sync, making DNS and blocklist management much easier. I’ll walk through how it works, how to set it up, how to choose the right settings, and why it might be useful for your network. 📺 Watch Video Info Don’t forget to give these repos a st...

entry.title: 6 JetKVMs, 1 Rack – The Ultimate Setup!
entry.summary: I wanted to rackmount 6 JetKVMs in my server rack, thankfully there’s a DIY solution for it. 📺 Watch Video Info Thanks to JaredC01 for the designs! https://github.com/JaredC01 LabStack-Rack Designs: https://github.com/JaredC01/LabStack-Rack JetKVM: https://jetkvm.com (provided most of the JetKVMs however no input into this video) Other Products I used (affiliate links below) M2...

entry.title: JetKVM: Promises Made, Promises Kept?
entry.summary: I received my JetKVM from backing it on Kickstarter and I wanted to find out if it delivers on all of its many promises it made during their campaign. 📺 Watch Video Info Check out JetKVM: https://jetkvm.com/ JetKVM on GitHub: https://github.com/jetkvm Other Products I used (affiliate links below) EZCOO Switch (hotkey model): https://amzn.to/3QKNGU4 EZCOO KVM Switch: https://amzn.to...
